md:
!tit two balls in a narrow box
!descr Two heavy balls (each in a compartiment) in a 2D box interact with 300 small light balls.

# Abstract

We study the friction question with two balls in a thin box with numerous small balls which regularily schock them. 

# Introduction 

We want to test the model of friction with the force proportionnal to the velocity which is supposed to emerge from the random schocks in a gas. 

# Results 

An exponential decrease for the velocities is observed for both balls as expected but the limit is higher for the heaviest ball. 



# Comments 

At the end the small balls seem to vibrate vertically. The two big balls have transmited all their energy to the small ones but mostly in the z direction. The histogram of the velocities shows two modes. One for the heaviest ball and mon for the lightest ball.
